svg.title: Pre-push uninspectable (blocking) terminal output
svg.desc: A terminal-style error box saying the pushed-file diff could not be computed in blocking mode.

text.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace

g.text: Push blocked: could not inspect pushed files

text.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace

g.text: Git could not list the files being pushed, so the pre-push test

g.text: Fix the Git error above, then push again.

g.text: To bypass this gate once: git push --no-verify
